title: David Bird
desc: David Bird - Vimy Ridge, Pashchendale.  Gassed. In hospitals in England until June 1918. Second World War joined up again, no overseas duty, 45 years old  WW1 & WW2

title: Alex Brass WW1 Veteran with Moostatik
desc: Alex Brass - Military Cross for conspicuous gallantry in action - Corporal Alexander Brass, 5th Battalion - awarded the military medal - single-handed capture of sixty German soldiers, gassed.
